last_action: T011 complete — 1158 jest, 245 python, parity, critique applied
intent: Make the Activity panel show the captured reasoning trail — fix the vanished structured decisions and add goal/verified/coverage/classification surfaces
expectations: no visual redesign of the Activity panel
living-specs rendering (#394) stays out — kept last
approach: Normalize the reasoning-trail fields in stateDerivation (fixing the string-only decisions filter), mirror onto both ViewerState copies, render via one card per field family (Intent/Verified/Coverage new, Decisions/Approach extended); coverage entries gain a title captured at tasks-time; design critique gate before finish

decisions.decision: normalize in the derivation, webview stays a dumb renderer
decisions.why: pickConcerns precedent; injection safety trivial via JSX text; tests live on the extension side
decisions.rejected: per-card defensive parsing in the webview

decisions.decision: requirements captured as coverage titles, not a new list
decisions.why: one flag on the existing upsert; readable exactly where the data is rendered
decisions.rejected: separate requirements[] field at specify time

decisions.decision: classification renders as one line in the Approach card
decisions.why: one datum; a whole card reads as clutter (design-taste: no duplicate/empty surfaces)

decisions.decision: coverage renders exceptions-first (uncovered up front, full map behind a native disclosure)
decisions.why: 11-13 rows of ID prose was the panel-killer; the gaps are the signal; zero-covered collapses to one line
decisions.rejected: flat full listing (wall of text) and a JS-state toggle (details/summary is free and accessible)

decisions.decision: kept the Out of scope label on the Goal card
decisions.why: the capture field is documented as non-goals/out-of-scope; 384 drifting guardrails into it is emission discipline, not a labeling bug
decisions.rejected: renaming to Constraints (would mislabel true exclusions)

plan.summary: 3 new cards + 2 extended, derivation normalizers, coverage-title capture, critique gate
plan.key_finding: ViewerState exists twice (core + webview) and must stay in sync
